Thank you for joining CanPany. We are excited to have you on board!

Hello {0},

Your password reset code is: {1}

This code will expire in {2} minutes.

If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.

Accepted.Subject: Application Update: {0} - CanPany
Accepted.Body:
Hello {0},

Good news! Your application for the position of "{1}" has been accepted by the employer.

Please check your notifications in the app for next steps regarding the interview or onboarding process.

Best of luck!

Rejected.Subject: Application Update: {0} - CanPany
Rejected.Body:
Hello {0},

Thank you for your interest in the "{1}" position.

After careful consideration, the employer has decided not to proceed with your application at this time.

We encourage you to apply for other openings on CanPany.
